decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id is corridor_webster-ave-bronx. The closest registry match is corridor_webster-ave-bronx, which is the observation's own base_record_id. Per the rules, when the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is new — the observation already resolves to that id. The registry record corridor_webster-ave-bronx already captures this Webster Avenue corridor with matching limits (from The Hub to Williamsbridge) and borough (Bronx).

evidence_refs.source_quote: Webster Avenue corridor based on the existing Bx41 route
Webster Avenue corridor based on the existing Bx41 route, 5.3 miles from The Hub to Williamsbridge
